steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery

steps.expression: (() => { const close = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Close')); if (close) { close.click(); } return true; })()

(() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').includes('Add table calc'))); if (!button) { throw new Error('Add table calc button not found'); } button.click(); })()

(() => { const group = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__measure-pill-group')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').includes('Running Avails'))); if (!group) { throw new Error('Running Avails pill group not found'); } const button = group.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__measure-pill-action'); if (!button) { throw new Error('Running Avails manage button not found'); } button.click(); })()
document.body.innerText.includes('Running Avails Edited updated.') || document.body.innerText.includes('Running Avails Edited updated. Refreshing results.')

(() => { const headers = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__table th')).map((entry) => (entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase()); return headers.includes('running avails edited'); })()

(() => { const keys = ['reportBuilder.state.demoReportBuilder.demoReportBuilderWindow', 'reportBuilder.state.demoReportBuilder']; return keys.some((key) => { const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(key); if (!raw) { return false; } try { const parsed = JSON.parse(raw); return Array.isArray(parsed?.localTableCalculations) && parsed.localTableCalculations.some((entry) => entry?.id === 'runningAvails' && entry?.label === 'Running Avails Edited'); } catch (_) { return false; } }); })()

(() => { const group = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__measure-pill-group')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').includes('Running Avails Edited'))); if (!group) { throw new Error('Running Avails Edited pill group not found'); } const button = group.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__measure-pill-action'); if (!button) { throw new Error('Running Avails Edited manage button not found'); } button.click(); })()

steps.text: runningAvails removed from local table calculations.

steps.expression: (() => { const headers = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__table th')).map((entry) => (entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase()); return !headers.includes('running avails edited'); })()

(() => { const keys = ['reportBuilder.state.demoReportBuilder.demoReportBuilderWindow', 'reportBuilder.state.demoReportBuilder']; return keys.every((key) => { const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(key); if (!raw) { return true; } try { const parsed = JSON.parse(raw); return !Array.isArray(parsed?.localTableCalculations) || !parsed.localTableCalculations.some((entry) => entry?.id === 'runningAvails'); } catch (_) { return false; } }); })()

steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery

steps.expression: (() => { const headers = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__table th')).map((entry) => (entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase()); return !headers.includes('running avails edited'); })()
